title: Sophie's Surprise 29th
full_description: Get in losers, Sophie is turning 29 and we're celebrating. This is award-winning circus, comedy and chaos disguised as a house party, featuring world-leading performers from Cirque du Soleil, La Clique, The 7 Fingers and more. Expect Twilight fan fiction, death-defying circus feats and a pumping soundtrack at the craziest party of your life. Get your Walkmans, scrunchies and halter tops ready, and remember... don't tell Sophie.
ai_summary: A sell-out Fringe phenomenon — world-class circus and cabaret performed as an interactive 90s house party, with one lucky audience member crowned Sophie each night. Performers from Cirque du Soleil and La Clique, aerial acrobatics, unicycle stunts, and a Twilight-themed singalong.
